description: USPTO patent velocity tracker. R&D acceleration as 12-24mo leading indicator for product launches, M&A, pivots. PatentsView API free. Velocity (recent_90d vs trailing baseline) + new CPC category detection. Used by quant funds (Susquehanna, RBC, Two Sigma).

schedule.description: Patent velocity — daily 17 UTC (patent grants published Tuesdays; daily picks up new + ensures stale not served)
